categories.description: Pulls data in from external sources (email, web, RSS, files). No outbound writes.
categories.name: ingest

categories.description: Classifies and routes inbound items (inbox triage, task priority, noise filtering).
categories.name: triage

categories.description: Summarises across a window of time (daily digest, weekly review, project status).
categories.name: digest

categories.description: Restructures or enriches existing data (reformatting, tagging, linking, merging).
categories.name: transform

categories.description: Pushes outbound alerts, reminders, or messages based on triggers.
categories.name: notify

categories.description: Surfaces items for human attention (HITL queues, approval flows, quality checks).
categories.name: review

categories.description: Keeps two or more sources in lockstep (bidirectional updates, reconciliation).
categories.name: sync

categories.description: Produces structured output for audit or sharing (monthly financials, health reports).
categories.name: report
